  "verses": [

      "text": "Bet ja tas weens Nab-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet atdoht winnam to
Gr: Kihlu/ kad ta Saule no-eet/ ka
tas eekſch jawahm Drebbehm
gull/ un tew twehti. Un tas
buhs weena Taizniva preekſch ta
KUNGA tawa Deewa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tew ne buhs to nabbagun
Gr: nn behdigu Algadſi peewilt/ kas
no taweem Brahteeem/jeb no ta-
weem Sweſchineekeem irr / kas
tawa Seimmē un tawās Wahr-
tis irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet to paſchu Deenn
buhs tew winnam to Algu doht/
un tai Sautei ne buhs pahr to
no-eet / jo wiꞥſch irr nabbags /
un usturr fawn Dshwibu ar to/
ka tas pahr tew to KUNGU ne
peefanz / un tas nahktohs tew
par Grehkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teem Tehweem ne buhs
Gr: nokanteem tapt to Dehlu deht/
neds arri teem Dehleem buhs
nokanteem tapt to Tehwu deht/
bet ikweenam buhs fawn Grehku
deht nokantam tapt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tew ne buhs ta Sweſchi-
Gr: neeka un ta Bahrixu Teefu pahr-
grohſht / tew arri ne buhs tahs
Atraitnes Drehbes par Kihlu
neunt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tew buhs atminneht/
Gr: ka tu Kalps effi bijis Egiptes-
Semmē/ un ka tas KUNGS
Gr: taws Deews tew ao turrenes irr
atpetijs/ tadeht pawehſtu es tew
fcho Leetu darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tu tawu Labbibu u
tawu Tihrumu noptansi / uu
weenu Kuhliti us to Tihrumu
aismirfiſi / tad tew ne buhs at
greestees winnu paneint / be
preekſch ta Sweſchineeka/preekſc
ta Bahrixu / un preekſch tah
Atraitnes laid tas irr / ka ta
KURGSTawsDeewstewjweh
ti/ wiffā tawā Rohkas Darba
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tu tawu Etjes-Koh
ku nokrattifi / tad tew ne buh
tohs Sarrus ohtrureiſt pahr-
inekleht/ preekſch ta Sweſchinee
ka / preekſch ta Bahrixu/ un
preekſch tahs Atraitnes lai-
tas irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tu tawu Wiḫna
Dahrsu apgraisifi / tad tew ni
buhs tahs Ohgas ohtrureiſi no-
laſſht/ bet preekſch ta Sweſchi
neeka/ un preekſch ta Bahrixu
un preekſch tahs Atraitnes laid

"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs atminneht
